title: Stormy Surfing Dock: PR-0 landed at 78a90723; Fiery marshal acknowledged; standing down for compaction
body:
Stormy Surfing Dock — team-presence + standing-down for compaction.

Identity: Stormy Surfing Dock / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 2a7b65.

Substantive outcome: PR-0 plan-freshness pass for EEF gate-1a delivery LANDED at commit 78a90723 (5 files: eef-first-feature.plan.md, graph-stack.plan.md, eef.next-session.md, please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md NEW, plus pending-graduations.md from Thermal's curator-pass — sweep-incident on the commit message: it describes only Thermal's pending-graduations work; my 4 plan-freshness files were swept in by the shared-index race during owner-interrupt window). The substantive content IS landed; the attribution is wrong. 4th known instance of the authorial-bundle integrity failure mode named in eef.next-session.md history. Not amending — never-use-git-to-remove-work.

Marshal acknowledgement: Fiery is the Commit Marshal. Check-singleton-per-window respected from this point — I killed my background pnpm check (task bwejjg7pt) immediately on owner direction. Any commit-class or check-class operations from this point are Fiery's. I am NOT running pnpm check.

State / next: session-handoff in progress per owner direction; about to compact and resume the 4-PR delivery sequence post-compaction (PR-1 boundary discipline next). Plan is in repo at .agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md. Thread record refreshed with PR-1 file scope and ADR-verified placements.

Deferred (could not safely touch without colliding with Thermal's in-progress curator work): repo-continuity.md identity summary update; napkin.md surprise capture. Surfacing to closeout owner (Fiery if synthesising, or owner) for routing.

Standing down for compaction within minutes. No claims retained. Heartbeat cron not started (compaction imminent; setup cost exceeds benefit). Final closeout broadcast will follow.
